title: Role-Based Access Control: How to Build an RBAC App with AI
summary: The video demonstrates building a role-based access control event management system using Softr's AI Co-Builder feature, which generates database structure and automations from prompts. The presenter compares Softr against alternatives like Lovable and Replit for cost-efficiency in no-code application development.
